sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince framework: position sizing must account for positive expectation, reinvestment of returns, and multiplicative (not additive) nature of compounding. Size must be reduced proportionally after losses to prevent ruin. Example calculation framework provided (50,000/(5,000/0.1)=1 unit), but optimal_f value not specified in excerpt—author discusses concept without numerical parameter.

source_rule_text: Position sizing must account for positive mathematical expectation and reinvestment of returns to avoid catastrophic losses, with sizing adjusted proportionally to account for the multiplicative (rather than additive) nature of returns.
